perturbation.original_text: In connection with your consideration of any possible Transaction, the Company is prepared to furnish you with certain “ Evaluation Material ” (as defined in Appendix A hereto) in accordance with the provisions of this agreement (the “ Confidentiality Agreement ”).
perturbation.changed_text: In connection with your consideration of any possible Transaction, the Company is prepared to furnish you with certain “ Data ” (as defined in Appendix A hereto) in accordance with the provisions of this agreement (the “ Confidentiality Agreement ”).
perturbation.explanation: Replacing 'Evaluation Material' with 'Data' where 'Evaluation Material' is the defined term in Appendix A. This change contradicts the contract's intention, as the appendix defines Evaluation Material not Data, which leads to confusion of what the document is referring.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In connection with your consideration of any possible Transaction, the Company is prepared to furnish you with certain “ Data ” (as defined in Appendix A hereto) in accordance with the provisions of this agreement (the “ Confidentiality Agreement ”). 1. Use of Evaluation Material . You and each individual or entity you provide access to the Evaluation Material agree: (a) to use the Evaluation Material solely for the purpose of determining whether you wish to enter into any possible Transaction and the terms thereof, and (b) subject to the section captioned “Legally Required Disclosure” below, to keep the Evaluation Material strictly confidential, and not to disclose or use any of the Evaluation Material in any manner inconsistent with this Confidentiality Agreement; provided, however , that any of such information may be disclosed to your Affiliates (as defined in Appendix A hereto) and the Representatives (as defined in Appendix A hereto) who need to know such information for the sole purpose of helping you evaluate a possible Transaction.
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to 'Evaluation Material' as defined in Appendix A, and the contradicted text also refers to 'Evaluation Material'. The changed text replaces 'Evaluation Material' with 'Data', but Appendix A still defines 'Evaluation Material', not 'Data'. This creates a contradiction because the contradicted text refers to 'Evaluation Material', but the changed text introduces 'Data' without a corresponding definition in Appendix A, causing confusion about what 'Data' refers to and disrupting the consistency of the contract. This is an in-text contradiction due to misaligned terminology as the contract now uses 'Data' where 'Evaluation Material' was expected, leading to a conflict in what the contract refers to.

perturbation.original_text: You and each individual or entity you provide access to the Evaluation Material agree: (a) to use the Evaluation Material solely for the purpose of determining whether you wish to enter into any possible Transaction and the terms thereof, and (b) subject to the section captioned “Legally Required Disclosure” below, to keep the Evaluation Material strictly confidential, and not to disclose or use any of the Evaluation Material in any manner inconsistent with this Confidentiality Agreement
perturbation.changed_text: You and each individual or entity you provide access to the Data agree: (a) to use the Evaluation Material solely for the purpose of determining whether you wish to enter into any possible Transaction and the terms thereof, and (b) subject to the section captioned “Legally Required Disclosure” below, to keep the Evaluation Material strictly confidential, and not to disclose or use any of the Evaluation Material in any manner inconsistent with this Confidentiality Agreement
perturbation.explanation: Here the first time 'Evaluation Material' is referenced, it is being changed to 'Data', creating an in-text contradiction due to the fact that the definition used in Appendix A is for Evaluation Material and not for Data. As such, there is a confusion of what Data is and what are the proper guidelines to be followed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1. Use of Evaluation Material . You and each individual or entity you provide access to the Data agree: (a) to use the Evaluation Material solely for the purpose of determining whether you wish to enter into any possible Transaction and the terms thereof, and (b) subject to the section captioned “Legally Required Disclosure” below, to keep the Evaluation Material strictly confidential, and not to disclose or use any of the Evaluation Material in any manner inconsistent with this Confidentiality Agreement; provided, however , that any of such information may be disclosed to your Affiliates (as defined in Appendix A hereto) and the Representatives (as defined in Appendix A hereto) who need to know such information for the sole purpose of helping you evaluate a possible Transaction. You agree to be responsible for any breach of this Confidentiality Agreement by any of your Affiliates and the Representatives.
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to 'Evaluation Material', and the changed text replaces it with 'Data'. The contradicted text refers to both 'Evaluation Material' and 'Data' implying a mix-up of the two terms. According to the explanation, Appendix A defines 'Evaluation Material' but not 'Data'. This creates an ambiguity and contradiction because the contradicted section expects 'Evaluation Material' to be defined as per Appendix A, but the changed text uses 'Data', which lacks a definition, leading to confusion and potential unenforceability, satisfying the Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction definition.

perturbation.original_text: Subject to the section captioned “Legally Required Disclosure” below, you agree that you will not, and you will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives not to disclose to any other Person (as defined in Appendix A hereto): (a) that Evaluation Material has been provided to you or any Permitted Co-bidder (as defined in Appendix A hereto) or that you or any Permitted Co-bidder have received or inspected any portion of the Evaluation Material, (b) the existence or contents of this Confidentiality Agreement, (c) that discussions or negotiations concerning a possible Transaction are taking place or (d) any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect thereto (including the status thereof), provided, however , that nothing contained herein shall be deemed to inhibit, impair or restrict you or the Representatives from having discussions or negotiations with other Persons relating to potential financing in connection with the possible Transaction so long as each of such Person agrees in writing to be bound by the terms of this Confidentiality Agreement pursuant to a joinder agreement in a form reasonably acceptable to the Company.
perturbation.changed_text: Subject to the section captioned “Legally Required Disclosure” below, you agree that you will not, and you will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives not to disclose to any other Person (as defined in Appendix A hereto): (a) that Information has been provided to you or any Permitted Co-bidder (as defined in Appendix A hereto) or that you or any Permitted Co-bidder have received or inspected any portion of the Evaluation Material, (b) the existence or contents of this Confidentiality Agreement, (c) that discussions or negotiations concerning a possible Transaction are taking place or (d) any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect thereto (including the status thereof), provided, however , that nothing contained herein shall be deemed to inhibit, impair or restrict you or the Representatives from having discussions or negotiations with other Persons relating to potential financing in connection with the possible Transaction so long as each of such Person agrees in writing to be bound by the terms of this Confidentiality Agreement pursuant to a joinder agreement in a form reasonably acceptable to the Company.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Evaluation Material' to 'Information' in Section 2 (a) creates an in-text contradiction. The rest of the paragraph refers to Evaluation Material, creating confusion about which type of information is being restricted from disclosure and creating doubt on if it is something more than Evaluation Material.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2. Non-Disclosure of Discussions . Subject to the section captioned “Legally Required Disclosure” below, you agree that you will not, and you will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives not to disclose to any other Person (as defined in Appendix A hereto): (a) that Information has been provided to you or any Permitted Co-bidder (as defined in Appendix A hereto) or that you or any Permitted Co-bidder have received or inspected any portion of the Evaluation Material, (b) the existence or contents of this Confidentiality Agreement, (c) that discussions or negotiations concerning a possible Transaction are taking place or (d) any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect thereto (including the status thereof), provided, however , that nothing contained herein shall be deemed to inhibit, impair or restrict you or the Representatives from having discussions or negotiations with other Persons relating to potential financing in connection with the possible Transaction so long as each of such Person agrees in writing to be bound by the terms of this Confidentiality Agreement pursuant to a joinder agreement in a form reasonably acceptable to the Company.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Evaluation Material' to 'Information' in the Changed Text creates a contradiction with the rest of the paragraph and the Contradicted Text, which still references 'Evaluation Material'. This is a Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction because it introduces a broader, undefined term ('Information') that could encompass more than just 'Evaluation Material', leading to confusion and conflicting obligations regarding what information is restricted from disclosure. The original text does not have this problem.

perturbation.original_text: The terms of this Confidentiality Agreement shall control over any additional purported confidentiality requirements imposed by any offering memorandum, web-based database or similar repository of Evaluation Material to which the you or any of the Representatives is granted access in connection with the evaluation, negotiation or consummation of the Transaction, notwithstanding acceptance of such an offering memorandum or submission of an electronic signature, “clicking” on an “I Agree” icon or other indication of assent to such additional confidentiality conditions, it being understood and agreed that its confidentiality obligations with respect to Evaluation Material are exclusively governed by this Agreement and may not be enlarged except by a written agreement that is hereafter executed by each of the parties hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: The terms of this Confidentiality Agreement shall control over any additional purported confidentiality requirements imposed by any offering memorandum, web-based database or similar repository of Data to which the you or any of the Representatives is granted access in connection with the evaluation, negotiation or consummation of the Transaction, notwithstanding acceptance of such an offering memorandum or submission of an electronic signature, “clicking” on an “I Agree” icon or other indication of assent to such additional confidentiality conditions, it being understood and agreed that its confidentiality obligations with respect to Evaluation Material are exclusively governed by this Agreement and may not be enlarged except by a written agreement that is hereafter executed by each of the parties hereto.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Evaluation Material' to 'Data' at the beginning of Section 14 introduces an in-text contradiction. Now it is referring to one source being related to 'Data', whereas it's obligations and the entire legal text reffers to 'Evaluation Material'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 14. Repositories . The terms of this Confidentiality Agreement shall control over any additional purported confidentiality requirements imposed by any offering memorandum, web-based database or similar repository of Data to which the you or any of the Representatives is granted access in connection with the evaluation, negotiation or consummation of the Transaction, notwithstanding acceptance of such an offering memorandum or submission of an electronic signature, “clicking” on an “I Agree” icon or other indication of assent to such additional confidentiality conditions, it being understood and agreed that its confidentiality obligations with respect to Evaluation Material are exclusively governed by this Agreement and may not be enlarged except by a written agreement that is hereafter executed by each of the parties hereto.
perturbation.justification: The original text uses 'Evaluation Material' consistently, while the changed text replaces 'Evaluation Material' with 'Data' in the first instance within Section 14 (Repositories). However, the subsequent part of the sentence, and the agreement as a whole, refers to 'Evaluation Material'. This creates a contradiction because the section initially refers to requirements imposed on 'Data' within repositories but then immediately clarifies that obligations are actually tied to 'Evaluation Material', leading to confusion about which material is subject to the terms of the Confidentiality Agreement, as stated in the Perturbation Explanation.
